overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through wet streets, stopping at traffic lights and passing under overpasses while surrounded by cyberpunk architecture, holographic billboards, and heavy atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road with overpasses

events.description: passing under first highway overpass into denser urban area
approaching intersection with crosswalk markings visible

agents.ego_description: driving forward through heavy rain, maintaining steady speed while following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: large rectangular building with bright orange facade and dark windows
concrete overpass structure spanning the road with support columns
curved highway ramp with concrete barriers and street lighting
tall palm trees visible against the neon-lit skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street. The vehicle passes under a highway overpass while following a red sedan. An orange industrial warehouse dominates the right side initially, giving way to elevated highway ramps and palm trees as the car approaches an intersection with visible crosswalk markings.

events.description: executing right turn at intersection onto commercial street
entering dense commercial area with large digital billboards and storefronts

agents.ego_description: turning right at intersection then accelerating through commercial district, navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan passing on the left side in adjacent lane

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying 'PASSION' advertisement with pink neon lighting
temporary concrete road barriers lining the left side of the street
floating holographic signs and digital displays above storefronts
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection, entering a dense commercial corridor lined with holographic advertisements and massive digital billboards including a prominent 'PASSION' display. Concrete barriers line the left side while the car navigates through moderate traffic, passing black sedans and approaching a traffic light structure in the distance.

events.description: coming to complete stop at red traffic light behind other vehicles
traffic light changes to green, vehicle begins accelerating forward
proceeding through intersection onto elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: stopping at red traffic light and waiting, then accelerating through the intersection as the light turns green

notable_agents.action: pedestrians waiting at crosswalk corner, some crossing as light changes

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on wet asphalt with yellow tactile paving
high-rise glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows
curved on-ramp leading to elevated highway with concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows to a stop at a red traffic light at a major intersection, waiting behind other stopped cars while pedestrians gather at the crosswalk corners. As the light turns green around 44 seconds, the car accelerates forward through the zebra crossing markings, passing tall office buildings on the left and entering a highway ramp structure ahead.

events.description: entering elevated highway section with graffiti-covered concrete walls
passing under overpass structure with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway, navigating gentle curves while maintaining high speed

notable_agents.action: dark sedan ahead maintaining distance on the highway

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti and street art
tall concrete noise reduction barriers with metal fencing on top
green illuminated directional signs suspended over the roadway
low-rise industrial buildings with metal siding and loading docks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle accelerating onto an elevated highway section characterized by graffiti-covered concrete walls on the right and sound barriers on the left. The environment becomes more industrial with warehouse buildings visible in the distance. The car passes under overpass structures with reduced lighting, following a dark sedan ahead while navigating the curved highway ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a rainy industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins by following a red sedan beneath a highway overpass, passing an orange industrial warehouse on the right before the view opens up to elevated ramps and palm trees near a marked intersection. As the vehicle executes a right turn, the industrial surroundings shift into a dense urban environment dominated by massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements, including a prominent Passion display. The camera then navigates through moderate traffic past black sedans and concrete barriers, finally moving toward a distant traffic light structure under the glow of the city's neon lights.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a congested city intersection into a desolate industrial highway. It begins with the car slowing to a stop at a red light, idling behind other vehicles while pedestrians gather at the crosswalk corners. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates across the zebra markings and passes tall office buildings before entering a highway ramp structure. The scene then shifts toward an elevated section of the road, where the environment becomes more industrial with graffiti-covered concrete walls and distant warehouses. Finally, the camera follows a dark sedan through a curved ramp, passing under dimly lit overpass structures as the urban density fades into a starker, utilitarian landscape.
